notes: Target.com retail homepage. Header with search bar, sign in, and cart. Category mega-menu navigation. Store locator by zip code. Promotional hero banners and deal sections. Product carousels with Add to Cart buttons. Replaces etsy-main (bot-protected).

endpoints.label: Product Search
endpoints.description: Search bar input for finding products and categories with typeahead suggestions

endpoints.label: Sign In
endpoints.description: Account sign-in link in the header for user authentication

endpoints.label: Cart
endpoints.description: Shopping cart icon/link in header showing item count

endpoints.label: Category Navigation
endpoints.description: Main category mega-menu with links to departments like Grocery, Clothing, Electronics, Home, Beauty, Toys

endpoints.label: Store Locator
endpoints.description: Store finder showing current zip code with option to select a different store location

endpoints.label: Deals and Promotions
endpoints.description: Featured deals, clearance, and Target Circle promotions section with links to sale categories

endpoints.label: Product Carousel
endpoints.description: Scrollable product recommendation carousels with product cards and Add to Cart buttons
